Jharkhand Public Service Commission JPSC has released Jharkhand Combined Civil Services Examination-2025 Advt.No.-01/2026 Exam Notice. Those candidates who are interested in this Jharkhand JPSC Civil Services Advt No 01/2026 recruitment can Exam City Details. Read the notification for recruitment eligibility, post information, selection procedure, age limit, pay scale and all other information.
Jharkhand Public Service Commission (JPSC) JPSC Combined Civil Services Examination 2025 JPSC Pre 2026 Advt No. : 01/2026:  Short Details of Notification WWW.SARKARIRESULT.COM

Important Dates Application Begin : 31/01/2026 Last Date for Apply Online : 09/03/2026 Upto 05 PM Pay Exam Fee Last Date : 10/03/2026 Exam Date (Old Date) : 12/04/2026 Exam Date (New Exam Date) : 19/04/2026 Exam City Available : 08/04/2026 Admit Card Available : 14/04/2026 Answer Key Available : 20/04/2026 Pre Result Available : 03/07/2026
Application Fee General / OBC / EWS: 100 /- SC / ST : 50/- Pay the Examination Fees  Through Debit Card / Credit Card / Net Banking Fees Mode Only.

Jharkhand Civil Services Notification 2026: Age Limit as on 01/08/2022 Minimum Age : 21 Years . Maximum Age : 35 Years. Age Relaxation Extra as per Jharkhand JPSC Civil Services Prelim Exam Recruitment Rules Advt no 01/2026.
JPSC Civil Services Recruitment 2026 : Vacancy Details Total : 103 Post
Bachelor Degree in Any Stream from Any Recognized University in India
JPSC Civil Services 2026 Exam : Post Wise Vacancy Details
Assistant Municipal Commissioner / Executive Officer / Special Officer

How to Fill Jharkhand JPSC Civil Services Online Form 2026 Jharkhand Public Service Commission (JPSC) Civil Services Recruitment 2026. Candidate Can Apply Between 31/01/2026  to 20/02/2026 Candidate Read the Notification Before Apply the Recruitment Jobs Application Form in Jharkhand JPSC Civil Services PCS Pre Latest Vacancy 2026. Kindly Check and Collect the All Document – Eligibility, ID Proof, Address Details, Basic Details. Kindly Ready Scan Document Related to Recruitment Form – Photo, Sign, ID Proof, Etc. Before Submit the Application Form Must Check the Preview and All Column Carefully. If Candidate Are Required to Paying the Application Fee Must Pay and Complete Your Form Take A Print Out of Final Submitted Form.
Interested Candidates Can Read the Full JPSC Pre 2026 Notification Before Apply Online.
